headline: “Compute Is the New Oil”: Kalshi Just Launched a Way to Bet on the Future Price of AI Computing Power
summary: Kalshi just launched a way to trade the future price of AI computing power, putting a CFTC-regulated startup on a collision course with the two biggest names in derivatives. The exchange that wins this land grab could own a market its founders say will eventually dwarf oil futures.

headline: DTCC, Wall Street’s post-trade powerhouse, tests tokenized markets with industry heavy hitters

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Intercontinental Exchange, Lowers Price Target to $190
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Patrick Moley   maintains Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $211 to $190.

headline: Barclays Cuts Its Target on ICE (ICE) But Keeps Betting on the Stock
summary: With an upside potential of 40.91%, Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE) is among the 12 Strong Buy Stocks with High Upside According to Analysts. On July 9, Barclays lowered its price target on Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE) to $180 from $201 while maintaining an Overweight rating on the shares.
